acceptance_targets: [ch11_f001] PASS if the revised chapter still includes all mandatory retrieval beats (wrong form, stigma field confrontation, AR-17 workaround, certified reveal) and also adds one explicit same-day consequence action after proof acquisition (direct contact attempt, boundary breach, or irreversible decision) before the handoff line at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:392; FAIL if aftermath remains planning-only.

[ch11_f002] PASS if each cited block contains no more than one consecutive sentence of pure procedural exposition before a concrete body/thought/action beat from Marisol; FAIL if two or more policy-only sentences run back-to-back without interior consequence in those spans.

[ch11_f003] PASS if the revised passage before snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:392 contains one concrete outreach attempt with immediate pushback or destabilizing consequence; FAIL if the sequence remains limited to planning, filing, and meeting attendance without new relational blowback.

[FBK-007] PASS if the 3967 instance is rewritten out of suppression-template form and chapter_11 contains at most one such construction (the retained 4065 beat). FAIL if both 3967 and 4065 remain in template form.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised chapter still includes all mandatory retrieval beats (wrong form, stigma field confrontation, AR-17 workaround, certified reveal) and also adds one explicit same-day consequence action after proof acquisition (direct contact attempt, boundary breach, or irreversible decision) before the handoff line at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:392; FAIL if aftermath remains planning-only.
findings.problem: The chapter's causal objective lands, but scene economy is lopsided: procedural loops dominate the middle while post-proof interpersonal consequence is comparatively compressed, reducing end-of-chapter dramatic leverage.
findings.rewrite_direction: Tighten repetitive transaction beats in the records-office run (especially snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:114, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:154, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:214) and reallocate space to one additional consequential choice beat in the aftermath section (snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:291, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:371) that changes what Marisol can or cannot do next chapter.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if each cited block contains no more than one consecutive sentence of pure procedural exposition before a concrete body/thought/action beat from Marisol; FAIL if two or more policy-only sentences run back-to-back without interior consequence in those spans.
findings.problem: Several policy-heavy stretches drift into process explanation mode, weakening embodied consequence and rhythm at moments that should carry maximum pressure.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:154, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:170, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:198, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:257, keep only the minimum procedural language needed for causality and pair each retained rule statement with immediate sensory or psychological fallout in Marisol's close-third perspective.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised passage before snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:392 contains one concrete outreach attempt with immediate pushback or destabilizing consequence; FAIL if the sequence remains limited to planning, filing, and meeting attendance without new relational blowback.
findings.problem: Timidity: after the witness-line reveal, the narrative repeatedly shifts into containment logistics (routing, packet assembly, delay) instead of forcing a fresh interpersonal collision, which softens the chapter's peak consequence.
findings.rewrite_direction: In the post-train section (snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:327, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:335, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:365, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:392), add one failed or costly direct outreach beat (to Gloria, Carina, or Ada) that keeps sobriety stakes active while preserving the chapter-12 handoff.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the 3967 instance is rewritten out of suppression-template form and chapter_11 contains at most one such construction (the retained 4065 beat). FAIL if both 3967 and 4065 remain in template form.
findings.problem: Recurring full-book pattern: suppression template appears across 4 chapters; this chapter contains two instances (3967 and 4065), making the tic audible. Decision for this chapter: KEEP the later high-pressure meeting-line version at 4065, REPLACE the earlier municipal-desk version at 3967.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3967-3968, replace the suppression scaffold with direct voiced admission or sensory-economic specificity. Preserve snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4065 as the chapter's single retained suppression beat.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When choosing between reputationally safe abstraction and specific discomfort, choose specificity. Render addiction, sexuality, deceit, class shame, and grief at lived scale. In edge cases, preserve character truth and causal accountability over reader comfort or institutional decorum.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene demands bodily, moral, or economic specificity, euphemistic phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with concrete stakes and observable consequence.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; full forms appear only for emphasis, ritual language, or character-specific formal posture

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density and pressure modes: pair high-conflict chapters with quiet domestic or documentary chapters, vary dialogue-to-interiority ratios, and prevent identical chapter skeletons in consecutive sequence.
prose_style_profile.diction: contemporary literary diction with class-aware, borough-specific concreteness; avoid prestige-neutral workshop language
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third centered on Marisol, with rare brief distance expansions for institutional scenes
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternating tensile compression and reflective extension; line-level cadence should carry emotional pressure, not just information
